title: cerasus × subhirtella f. autumnalis
intro: Cerasus × subhirtella f. autumnalis, also known as Autumn Cherry or Japanese Autumn Cherry, is a deciduous shrub or small tree belonging to the Rosaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its bark, which has been used to treat fever, rheumatism, and other conditions. The Autumn Cherry has been found to have various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may help to protect against cell damage, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. The plant's bark can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues.
